fields.label: Client ID
fields.placeholder: Your Foxit Cloud API client ID
fields.description: Foxit Cloud API client ID. Create a project in the Foxit Cloud API developer console, then copy the Client ID from https://cloudapi.fuxinsoft.cn/dev-console/project.

fields.label: Secret
fields.description: Foxit Cloud API client secret from the same developer console project: https://cloudapi.fuxinsoft.cn/dev-console/project.

actions.name: check_pages_are_scanned
actions.description: Submit one PDF for scanned-page detection in Foxit.

docId.description: An existing Foxit document ID returned by upload_file or a previous task.

name.description: Optional file name to use when uploading a multipart source to Foxit.

mimetype.description: Optional MIME type to use when uploading a multipart source to Foxit.

url.description: A public URL that the runtime can download before uploading to Foxit.

contentBase64.description: The Base64-encoded file content uploaded to Foxit as multipart.

file.description: A file source provided as a public URL or Base64 payload.

pageRange.description: The optional page range, such as 1-30, 1,3,5, or all.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for requesting per-page PDF analysis in Foxit.

anyOf.description: The upstream parameter validation issues returned by Foxit, if any.

outputSchema.description: The normalized task submission response returned by Foxit.

actions.name: compare_documents
actions.description: Compare two PDF documents with Foxit and submit a diff task.

baseDocId.description: The Foxit document ID for the baseline PDF when baseFile is omitted.

name.description: Optional file name to use when uploading a multipart source to Foxit.

mimetype.description: Optional MIME type to use when uploading a multipart source to Foxit.

url.description: A public URL that the runtime can download before uploading to Foxit.

contentBase64.description: The Base64-encoded file content uploaded to Foxit as multipart.

baseFile.description: A file source provided as a public URL or Base64 payload.

compareDocId.description: The Foxit document ID for the comparison PDF when compareFile is omitted.

name.description: Optional file name to use when uploading a multipart source to Foxit.

mimetype.description: Optional MIME type to use when uploading a multipart source to Foxit.

url.description: A public URL that the runtime can download before uploading to Foxit.

contentBase64.description: The Base64-encoded file content uploaded to Foxit as multipart.

compareFile.description: A file source provided as a public URL or Base64 payload.

resultType.description: Whether Foxit should return a JSON diff or a rendered PDF diff.

compareType.description: Whether Foxit should compare all changes or only text changes.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for comparing two PDF files.

anyOf.description: The upstream parameter validation issues returned by Foxit, if any.

outputSchema.description: The normalized task submission response returned by Foxit.

actions.name: compress_document
actions.description: Compress one PDF with a chosen Foxit compression level.

docId.description: An existing Foxit document ID returned by upload_file or a previous task.

name.description: Optional file name to use when uploading a multipart source to Foxit.

mimetype.description: Optional MIME type to use when uploading a multipart source to Foxit.

url.description: A public URL that the runtime can download before uploading to Foxit.

contentBase64.description: The Base64-encoded file content uploaded to Foxit as multipart.

file.description: A file source provided as a public URL or Base64 payload.

compressionLevel.description: The Foxit compression level to apply.

actions.name: convert_document
actions.description: Convert one PDF into Word, Excel, PowerPoint, image, or text with Foxit.

docId.description: An existing Foxit document ID returned by upload_file or a previous task.

name.description: Optional file name to use when uploading a multipart source to Foxit.

mimetype.description: Optional MIME type to use when uploading a multipart source to Foxit.

url.description: A public URL that the runtime can download before uploading to Foxit.

contentBase64.description: The Base64-encoded file content uploaded to Foxit as multipart.

file.description: A file source provided as a public URL or Base64 payload.

outputFormat.description: The target format that Foxit should convert the PDF into.

dpi.description: The output image DPI between 1 and 1000 when outputFormat is image.

pageRange.description: The page range when outputFormat is image, such as 1,3,5, 1-89, all, even, or odd.

imageConfig.description: The image conversion options accepted by Foxit.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for converting a PDF into another format.

anyOf.description: The upstream parameter validation issues returned by Foxit, if any.

outputSchema.description: The normalized task submission response returned by Foxit.

actions.name: convert_office_document_to_images
actions.description: Convert one Office document into a ZIP of page images with Foxit.

docId.description: An existing Foxit document ID returned by upload_file or a previous task.

name.description: Optional file name to use when uploading a multipart source to Foxit.

mimetype.description: Optional MIME type to use when uploading a multipart source to Foxit.

url.description: A public URL that the runtime can download before uploading to Foxit.

contentBase64.description: The Base64-encoded file content uploaded to Foxit as multipart.

file.description: A file source provided as a public URL or Base64 payload.

format.description: The input Office document format that Foxit should convert to images.

dpi.description: The output image DPI between 1 and 1000.

destImgSuffix.description: The image file suffix Foxit should generate for each page.

anyOf.description: The upstream parameter validation issues returned by Foxit, if any.

actions.name: create_pdf_from_html
actions.description: Create a PDF from HTML content, an HTML file, or a webpage URL in Foxit.

format.description: Use a webpage URL as the HTML source.

url.description: The webpage URL to convert.

width.description: The output page width, greater than 16.

height.description: The output page height, greater than 16.

pageMode.description: The page mode where 0=single page and 1=multi-page.

pageScaling.description: The page scaling mode where 0=none, 1=fixed size, and 2=fit HTML content.

config.description: The HTML-to-PDF conversion options accepted by Foxit.

oneOf.description: The input payload for converting one webpage URL into a PDF.

docId.description: An existing Foxit document ID returned by upload_file or a previous task.

name.description: Optional file name to use when uploading a multipart source to Foxit.

mimetype.description: Optional MIME type to use when uploading a multipart source to Foxit.

url.description: A public URL that the runtime can download before uploading to Foxit.

contentBase64.description: The Base64-encoded file content uploaded to Foxit as multipart.

file.description: A file source provided as a public URL or Base64 payload.

format.description: The HTML document format that Foxit should read from the source file.

width.description: The output page width, greater than 16.

height.description: The output page height, greater than 16.

pageMode.description: The page mode where 0=single page and 1=multi-page.

pageScaling.description: The page scaling mode where 0=none, 1=fixed size, and 2=fit HTML content.

config.description: The HTML-to-PDF conversion options accepted by Foxit.

oneOf.description: The input payload for converting one HTML document source into a PDF.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating a PDF from HTML content or a webpage URL.

anyOf.description: The upstream parameter validation issues returned by Foxit, if any.

outputSchema.description: The normalized task submission response returned by Foxit.

actions.name: download_file
actions.description: Download one Foxit result document and upload it to local transit storage.

docId.description: The Foxit document ID to download.

fileName.description: Optional output file name passed through to Foxit download.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for downloading one Foxit result file.

name.description: The downloaded file name.

mimetype.description: The MIME type of the downloaded file.

downloadUrl.description: The local transit URL for downloading the file.

file.description: A downloadable file uploaded to local transit storage.

contentLength.description: The downloaded file size in bytes.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Foxit download response.

actions.name: extract_document
actions.description: Extract text or embedded images from one PDF with Foxit.

url.description: A public URL that the runtime can download before uploading to Foxit.

contentBase64.description: The Base64-encoded file content uploaded to Foxit as multipart.

mode.description: Whether Foxit should extract text or embedded images.

actions.name: get_pages_basic_info
actions.description: Submit one PDF for page-size and rotation analysis in Foxit.

docId.description: An existing Foxit document ID returned by upload_file or a previous task.

name.description: Optional file name to use when uploading a multipart source to Foxit.

mimetype.description: Optional MIME type to use when uploading a multipart source to Foxit.

url.description: A public URL that the runtime can download before uploading to Foxit.

contentBase64.description: The Base64-encoded file content uploaded to Foxit as multipart.

file.description: A file source provided as a public URL or Base64 payload.

pageRange.description: The optional page range, such as 1-30, 1,3,5, or all.

actions.name: get_task
actions.description: Fetch one Foxit task status and return the normalized task progress details.

taskId.description: The Foxit task ID to query.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for querying one Foxit task.

anyOf.description: The result document ID when the task has completed.
The reported task completion percentage.

isRunning.description: Whether Foxit reports the task as still running.

anyOf.description: The upstream detail message returned by Foxit, if any.
The per-page scanned-page result returned by pages_is_scanned tasks.
The page rotation where 0=0deg, 1=90deg, 2=180deg, and 3=270deg.
The page width in 1/72 inch units.
The page height in 1/72 inch units.

items.description: One page metadata item returned by Foxit.

anyOf.description: The page metadata returned by pages_basic_info tasks.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Foxit task status response.

actions.name: get_user_stock
actions.description: Fetch the remaining Foxit Services API and Embed API quota for the connected credential.

inputSchema.description: No input is required for this action.

anyOf.description: The total quota.
The used quota.
The remaining quota.
The Unix timestamp in seconds when the quota expires.
The Foxit stock type where 1=paid and 0=trial.
One Foxit stock summary.
The total quota.
The used quota.
The remaining quota.
The Unix timestamp in seconds when the quota expires.
The Foxit stock type where 1=paid and 0=trial.
One Foxit stock summary.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Foxit stock response.

actions.name: manipulate_document_pages
actions.description: Delete, rotate, or move PDF pages with Foxit.

docId.description: An existing Foxit document ID returned by upload_file or a previous task.

name.description: Optional file name to use when uploading a multipart source to Foxit.

mimetype.description: Optional MIME type to use when uploading a multipart source to Foxit.

url.description: A public URL that the runtime can download before uploading to Foxit.

contentBase64.description: The Base64-encoded file content uploaded to Foxit as multipart.

file.description: A file source provided as a public URL or Base64 payload.

pages.description: The zero-based page indexes affected by the operation.

destination.description: The target zero-based page index used by move operations.

config.description: The ordered list of page manipulation operations.

actions.name: merge_documents
actions.description: Merge multiple PDF documents into a single PDF with Foxit.

items.description: One Foxit document ID to merge.

docIds.description: The document IDs to merge in order.

name.description: Optional file name to use when uploading a multipart source to Foxit.

mimetype.description: Optional MIME type to use when uploading a multipart source to Foxit.

url.description: A public URL that the runtime can download before uploading to Foxit.

contentBase64.description: The Base64-encoded file content uploaded to Foxit as multipart.

zipFile.description: A file source provided as a public URL or Base64 payload.

isAddTOC.description: Whether Foxit should add a table of contents. Foxit requires isAddBookmark to stay true.

isContinueMerge.description: Whether Foxit should continue merging when one source document fails.

isRetainPageNum.description: Whether Foxit should retain logical page numbers.

bookmarkLevels.description: The bookmark level range used to generate a table of contents, such as 1 or 1-5.

config.description: The merge options accepted by Foxit.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for merging multiple PDF files.

anyOf.description: The upstream parameter validation issues returned by Foxit, if any.

outputSchema.description: The normalized task submission response returned by Foxit.

actions.name: upload_file
actions.description: Upload one source file to Foxit Cloud API and return the reusable Foxit document ID.

url.description: A public URL that the runtime can download before uploading to Foxit.

contentBase64.description: The Base64-encoded file content uploaded to Foxit as multipart.

file.description: A file source provided as a public URL or Base64 payload.

actions.name: watermark_document
actions.description: Add a text or image watermark to one PDF with Foxit.

docId.description: An existing Foxit document ID returned by upload_file or a previous task.

name.description: Optional file name to use when uploading a multipart source to Foxit.

mimetype.description: Optional MIME type to use when uploading a multipart source to Foxit.

url.description: A public URL that the runtime can download before uploading to Foxit.

contentBase64.description: The Base64-encoded file content uploaded to Foxit as multipart.

file.description: A file source provided as a public URL or Base64 payload.

imageDocId.description: An existing Foxit document ID for the watermark image when type is imageObject.

name.description: Optional file name to use when uploading a multipart source to Foxit.

mimetype.description: Optional MIME type to use when uploading a multipart source to Foxit.

url.description: A public URL that the runtime can download before uploading to Foxit.

contentBase64.description: The Base64-encoded file content uploaded to Foxit as multipart.

imageFile.description: A file source provided as a public URL or Base64 payload.

pageRange.description: The optional page range, such as 1-30, 1,3,5, or all.

type.description: Whether Foxit should use a text watermark or an image watermark.

position.description: The watermark anchor position between 0 and 8.

offsetX.description: The horizontal watermark offset in points.

offsetY.description: The vertical watermark offset in points.

flagOnTopOfPage.description: Whether the watermark stays above page content where 1=true and 0=false.

flagNoPrint.description: Whether the watermark is excluded from printing where 1=true and 0=false.

flagInvisible.description: Whether the watermark is invisible where 1=true and 0=false.

style.description: The watermark font style where 0=normal and 1=underline.

lineSpace.description: The line spacing value between 0 and 10.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for adding a watermark to a PDF.

anyOf.description: The upstream parameter validation issues returned by Foxit, if any.

outputSchema.description: The normalized task submission response returned by Foxit.
